languages.text: {n}Вскоре генеторы сообщили о первых результатах: у первого же обследованного и подвергнутого вивисекции немоча были обнаружены видоизмененные участки мозга, служащие для установления некоей загадочной связи с флорой и фауной планеты. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вскоре генеторы сообщили о первых результатах: у первого же обследованного и подвергнутого вивисекции немоча были обнаружены видоизмененные участки мозга, служащие для установления некоей загадочной связи с флорой и фауной планеты. {/n}

languages.text: {n}Before long, the Genetors reported their initial findings. In the very first retch examined and subjected to vivisection, they discovered modified regions of the brain that serve to establish an unidentified connection with the planet's flora and fauna.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вскоре генеторы сообщили о первых результатах: у первого же обследованного и подвергнутого вивисекции немоча были обнаружены видоизмененные участки мозга, служащие для установления некоей загадочной связи с флорой и фауной планеты. {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Before long, the Genetors reported their first findings. In the very first retch examined and subjected to vivisection, they discovered modified regions of the brain, serving to establish a mysterious connection with the planet's flora and fauna.{/n}

{n}Before long, the Genetors reported their first findings. In the very first retch examined and subjected to vivisection, they discovered modified regions of the brain, serving to establish a mysterious connection with the planet's flora and fauna.{/n}

{n}Before long, the Genetors reported their initial findings. In the very first retch examined and subjected to vivisection, they discovered modified regions of the brain that serve to establish an unidentified connection with the planet's flora and fauna.{/n}

{n}Before long, the Genetors reported their initial findings. In the very first retch examined and subjected to vivisection, they discovered modified regions of the brain that serve to establish an unidentified connection with the planet's flora and fauna.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Wenig später meldeten die Genetoren erste Erkenntnisse. Im Gehirn des ersten Speiers, den sie sezierten, entdeckten sie modifizierte Regionen, die der Herstellung einer nicht identifizierten Verbindung mit der Flora und Fauna des Planeten dienen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Before long, the Genetors reported their initial findings. In the very first retch examined and subjected to vivisection, they discovered modified regions of the brain that serve to establish an unidentified connection with the planet's flora and fauna.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Wenig später meldeten die Genetoren erste Erkenntnisse. Im Gehirn des ersten Speiers, den sie sezierten, entdeckten sie modifizierte Regionen, die der Herstellung einer nicht identifizierten Verbindung mit der Flora und Fauna des Planeten dienen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les genetors ne mirent guère longtemps à présenter leurs premières conclusions. En effet, ils avaient découvert, dans le premier infâme examiné et disséqué, des secteurs modifiés du cerveau servant à établir un lien inconnu avec la flore et la faune de la planète.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Before long, the Genetors reported their initial findings. In the very first retch examined and subjected to vivisection, they discovered modified regions of the brain that serve to establish an unidentified connection with the planet's flora and fauna.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les genetors ne mirent guère longtemps à présenter leurs premières conclusions. En effet, ils avaient découvert, dans le premier infâme examiné et disséqué, des secteurs modifiés du cerveau servant à établir un lien inconnu avec la flore et la faune de la planète.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los genetores no tardan en informar de sus primeros descubrimientos. Han encontrado regiones modificadas en el cerebro del primer degenerado que le permiten establecer un vínculo no identificado con la flora y la fauna del planeta.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Before long, the Genetors reported their initial findings. In the very first retch examined and subjected to vivisection, they discovered modified regions of the brain that serve to establish an unidentified connection with the planet's flora and fauna.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los genetores no tardan en informar de sus primeros descubrimientos. Han encontrado regiones modificadas en el cerebro del primer degenerado que le permiten establecer un vínculo no identificado con la flora y la fauna del planeta.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Genetörler, çok geçmeden ilk bulgularını rapor etti. İnceledikleri ve dirikesime tabi tuttukları ilk leşte, beynin gezegenin flora ve faunasıyla tanımlanamayan bir bağlantı kurmaya yarayan değişmiş bölgelerini keşfettiler.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Before long, the Genetors reported their initial findings. In the very first retch examined and subjected to vivisection, they discovered modified regions of the brain that serve to establish an unidentified connection with the planet's flora and fauna.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Genetörler, çok geçmeden ilk bulgularını rapor etti. İnceledikleri ve dirikesime tabi tuttukları ilk leşte, beynin gezegenin flora ve faunasıyla tanımlanamayan bir bağlantı kurmaya yarayan değişmiş bölgelerini keşfettiler.{/n}

languages.text: {n}不久之后，基因士们便报告了初步研究结果。在第一具接受活体解剖的丑恶种体内，他们发现了经过改造的大脑区域，这些区域可以与行星的动植物建立某种未知的联系。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Before long, the Genetors reported their initial findings. In the very first retch examined and subjected to vivisection, they discovered modified regions of the brain that serve to establish an unidentified connection with the planet's flora and fauna.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}不久之后，基因士们便报告了初步研究结果。在第一具接受活体解剖的丑恶种体内，他们发现了经过改造的大脑区域，这些区域可以与行星的动植物建立某种未知的联系。{/n}
